title: festuca matthewsii
intro: Festuca matthewsii, also known as Matthews' fescue, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Festuca matthewsii are said to include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. Festuca matthewsii can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
